briefdescription.para: This function is called to wake-up the monitor from sleep.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the application configuration structure.

briefdescription.para: This function is called to initiate training with the source device, using the predefined source configuration as well as the sink capabilities.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the application configuration structure.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if the function executes correctly. XST_FAILURE if the function fails to execute correctly

briefdescription.para: This function will configure and establish a link with the receiver device, afterwards, a video stream will start to be sent over the main link.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the application configuration structure.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if main link was successfully established.

briefdescription.para: This function is called when a Hot-Plug-Detect (HPD) event is received by the DisplayPort TX core.

detaileddescription.para: The XDPPSU_INTERRUPT_STATUS_HPD_EVENT_MASK bit of the core's XDPPSU_INTERRUPT_STATUS register indicates that an HPD event has occurred.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

simplesect.para: Use the XDpPsu_SetHpdEventHandler driver function to set this function as the handler for HPD pulses.

briefdescription.para: This function is called when a Hot-Plug-Detect (HPD) pulse is received by the DisplayPort TX core.

detaileddescription.para: The XDPPSU_INTERRUPT_STATUS_HPD_PULSE_DETECTED_MASK bit of the core's XDPPSU_INTERRUPT_STATUS register indicates that an HPD event has occurred.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpPsu instance.

simplesect.para: Use the XDpPsu_SetHpdPulseHandler driver function to set this function as the handler for HPD pulses.

briefdescription.para: This function is called to setup the VideoStream with its video and MSA attributes.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the application configuration structure.

simplesect.para: Use the XDpPsu_SetHpdEventHandler driver function to set this function as the handler for HPD pulses.

detaileddescription.para: Upon Hot- Plug-Detect (HPD - DisplayPort cable is plugged/unplugged or the monitor is turned on/off), the main link will be trained.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 aad 10/19/17 Initial Release 1.1 aad 02/22/18 Fixed the header 1.3 rbv 07/15/20 Fixed C++ compilation issues
